name: Tiramisu (Light)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the first six ingredients to a food processor. Process until smooth and set aside.
2. Mix hot water with instant espresso powder in a small bowl. Split each ladyfinger in half lengthwise. Dip 20 ladyfingers, cut side down, into the espresso mixture. Place them on the bottom of a 9-inch square baking dish. Repeat with remaining ladyfingers and espresso mixture. Spread 2 cups of cheese mixture evenly over the ladyfingers. Repeat with additional layers.
3. Insert toothpicks in each corner and center of the tiramisu. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 3-8 hours. Remove toothpicks and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Note: You can add fresh or frozen fruit, or cinnamon sugar as a garnish.
